title: ipv6_addr.h struct in6_addr detection heuristic could use a comment
description: ipv6_addr.h:43-56 detects whether struct in6_addr is already defined via header guard macros. The list of guards (_NETINET_IN_H, _NETINET_IN_H_, etc.) is correct but non-obvious. Add a one-line comment: '/* Common header guards indicating struct in6_addr already exists */'. This prevents a future maintainer from wondering why these specific macros.
